zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Gilchrist, Earl of Menteith於大約1232年出生在蘇格蘭。她於大約1252年與Sir Walter Comyn結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Gilchrist, Earl of Menteith于大约1232年出生在苏格兰。她于大约1252年与Sir Walter Comyn结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Gilchrist,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (western) and Irish (Down): from Gaelic Mac Giolla Chríosd, Mac Gille Chríosd ‘son of the servant of Christ’.

variants.name: Kilcrease
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Gilchrist  .
History: Robert Kilcrease (c. 1750–1808) came from Scotland(probably Kilmarnock) to Edgefield, SC, c. 1770.

variants.name: Gilchrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilkerson
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chrìosd ‘son of Gille Chrìosd' (see Gilchrist ).

variants.name: Gilkey
meanings: Irish (northern): possibly a pet form of the Scottishpersonal name   Gilchrist  .

variants.name: Gilcrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilcrease
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Gilchrist  .

nameMeanings.name: Earl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English e(o)rl ‘earl’, a traditional English title of nobility equivalent in rank to French and Norman Count .

variants.name: Earle
meanings: English: variant of   Earl  .

variants.name: Harle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Johann, Kurt.
South German (Härle): nickname from a diminutive of Middle High German hār ‘hair’.

English (northern) and Scottish: habitational name from Kirkharle and Little Harle in Northumberland (earlier simply Herle, Harle), possibly named from an Old English personal name Herela (a derivative of various compound names with the first element here ‘army’) + Old English lēah ‘wood, clearing’.

variants.name: Earls
meanings: English: variant of Earl with genitival -s, denoting someone who was a member of an earl's household, or, with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Ireland, when this is not the English name, it is from Gaelic Mac an Iarla ‘son of the earl’.

variants.name: Hearl
meanings: English: variant of Earl with prosthetic H-.

variants.name: Count
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earll
meanings: English (Kent): variant of   Earl  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montierth
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Monteith  .

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Gilchrist, Earl of Menteith was born about 1232, in Scotland. She married Sir Walter Comyn about 1252. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Gilchrist, Earl of Menteith est née environ 1232, à Écosse. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Comyn environ 1252. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Gilchrist, Earl of Menteith wurde um 1232 in Scotland geboren. Sie hat um 1252 Sir Walter Comyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Gilchrist, Earl of Menteith è nata il circa 1232 nel Scotland. Lei sposato Sir Walter Comyn circa 1252. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Polkelly, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kin: イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Gilchrist, Earl of Menteithは約1232年にスコットランドで生まれた。約1252年にSir Walter Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Gilchrist, Earl of Menteith(은)는 대략 1232년 스컷랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1252년 Sir Walter Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Gilchrist, Earl of Menteith nasceu aproximadamente 1232, em Scotland. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter Comyn aproximadamente 1252. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Gilchrist, Earl of Menteith родилась около 1232 г. в местности Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Comyn около 1252 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Gilchrist, Earl of Menteith nació aproximadamente 1232, en Scotland. Se casó con Sir Walter Comyn aproximadamente 1252. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
